title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Malabar Gold & Diamonds

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Malabar Gold & Diamonds
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Malabar Gold & Diamonds! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Ranchi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Malabar Gold & Diamonds:
Malabar Gold & Diamonds is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Malabar Gold & Diamonds!
